description: Add Running P&L area chart to trade detail page showing P&L progression over time using market data

userStories.title: Add Chart Dimensions Constant
userStories.description: As a developer, I want Running P&L chart dimensions in the analytics constants so the chart has consistent sizing.
acceptanceCriteria: Add `runningPnl` entry to `CHART_DIMENSIONS` in src/lib/analytics/constants.ts
Values: { height: 200, strokeWidth: 1.5 }
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
Verify in browser: attachment section no longer visible

userStories.title: Create Running P&L Chart Component
userStories.description: As a trader, I want a Running P&L chart that visualizes my trade's P&L over time so I can see how my position performed throughout its duration.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/components/trade-detail/running-pnl-chart.tsx
Props: symbol, direction, instrumentType, entryTime, exitTime, entryPrice, executions
Fetch market data using api.marketData.getFullDayChartData
Implement buildPnlTimeSeries() that: filters bars from entry to exit, calculates P&L at each bar close, tracks quantity changes from scale-in/out, accumulates realized P&L from exits
Use calculateFuturesPnL() and calculateForexPnL() from @/lib/market-data
AG Charts area series with: time X-axis (HH:mm), currency Y-axis, profit green/loss red fill, Terminal styling (ANALYTICS_COLORS, CHART_AXIS_STYLE)
Custom tooltip showing time and P&L with profit/loss coloring
Summary stats row: Final P&L, Peak P&L, Max Drawdown
Loading state with spinner while fetching market data
Empty state when no market data available
Handle open trades (no exitTime) - show up to last available bar
Reference: src/components/analytics/equity-curve.tsx for AG Charts pattern
Reference: src/components/trade-detail/replay/use-replay-engine.ts:273-306 for P&L calculation
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
Verify in browser: editor fills available vertical space in right panel

userStories.title: Integrate Chart into Content Panel
userStories.description: As a trader, I want to see the Running P&L chart in the trade detail page tab so I can analyze my trade's performance.
acceptanceCriteria: Import RunningPnlChart in src/components/trade-detail/content-panel.tsx
Pass required props from trade object: symbol, direction, instrumentType, entryTime, exitTime, entryPrice, executions
Remove placeholder (CandlestickChart icon and 'P&L over time coming soon' text)
Maintain proper styling in TabsContent
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
Verify in browser: navigate to trade detail page, click Running P&L tab, chart renders with area visualization
